question: Determine which file type among Python (.py), C (.c), Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb), Java (.java), and JavaScript (.js) in the GitHub codebase has the most files with a directory depth greater than 10, and provide the file count.
temp_SQL: SELECT file_type, file_count FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS file_count, CASE WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.c' THEN 'C' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.ipynb' THEN 'Jupyter Notebook' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.java' THEN 'Java' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.js' THEN 'JavaScript' END AS file_type FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" WHERE LENGTH(SPLIT_PART("path", '/', -1)) > 10 AND ("path" ILIKE '%.py' OR "path" ILIKE '%.c' OR "path" ILIKE '%.ipynb' OR "path" ILIKE '%.java' OR "path" ILIKE '%.js') GROUP BY file_type) AS counts ORDER BY file_count DESC LIMIT 1;
final_SQL: SELECT file_type, file_count FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS file_count, CASE WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.c' THEN 'C' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.ipynb' THEN 'Jupyter Notebook' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.java' THEN 'Java' WHEN "path" ILIKE '%.js' THEN 'JavaScript' END AS file_type FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" WHERE LENGTH(SPLIT_PART("path", '/', -1)) > 10 AND ("path" ILIKE '%.py' OR "path" ILIKE '%.c' OR "path" ILIKE '%.ipynb' OR "path" ILIKE '%.java' OR "path" ILIKE '%.js') GROUP BY file_type) AS counts ORDER BY file_count DESC LIMIT 1;
